subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Day of Resurrection! In the Day of Manifestation hath the Trumpet been sounded and the Clarion been blown, both for the steadfast and the doubtful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای موقن بیوم قیام در یوم ظهور نفخ صور شد و نقر ناقور گشت موقن و مرتاب هر دو
subcodes.subjects: @life and death, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision
